text:
of bill type. Many different types of services can 
appear on an encounter institutional claim, and knowing the type of bill helps to distinguish them. The 
type of bill is the concatenation of three variables: the facility type (CLM_FAC_TYPE_CD), the service 
classification type code (CLM_SRVC_CLSFCTN_TYPE_CD), and the claim frequency code 
(CLM_FREQ_CD).
